headline: USB's Organic Growth Solid: What's Fueling Top-Line Expansion?
summary: U.S. Bancorp leans on stronger loan pipelines, improving deposit mix and rising fee income for solid top-line growth.

headline: M&T Bank CEO René Jones Highlights Strong Performance, Technology Transformation in Annual Letter
summary: M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) Chairman and CEO René Jones has released his annual message to shareholders, which highlights the bank's consistent, strong financial performance and its investments in technology and talent.
